label: Global EV Battery Demand (2025 est.)
deltaNote: Up from ~985 GWh in 2024; China accounts for ~60% of demand

label: Avg. Battery Pack Price
deltaNote: Sub-$100/kWh milestone passed in 2025; first since 2023 price spike

label: China's Global Battery Production Share
contestNote: Declining from ~77% peak as Korean and nascent Western capacity expands; CATL + BYD alone hold ~55%

label: Lithium Carbonate (China spot)
deltaNote: Sharp Q1 2026 spike driven by Zimbabwe export suspension and depleted inventories; still 68% below Nov 2022 peak

label: Best Solid-State Energy Density (lab)
contestNote: Cell-level lab result for aviation; commercial automotive solid-state packs remain ~250–300 Wh/kg

label: World's Largest Grid Battery
deltaNote: Replacing gas peaker plants; enables 300,000+ homes for 4 hours

label: Longest Production EV Range (WLTP)
contestNote: WLTP vs. real-world range differ by 20–30%; range anxiety remains key consumer barrier

label: Sodium-Ion Global Output / Pipeline
deltaNote: 60 GWh HyperStrong grid deal is world's largest Na-ion order; CATL 2nd-gen cell reaches ~200 Wh/kg; production cost within 5% of LFP at volume
